description: ILLUSTRATIVE DEFAULTS — placeholder numbers so `estimate` produces a shaped result out of the box. They are NOT authoritative. Copy this file, put in your contracted prices and a real energy/grid model, and pass it with `estimate --pack`. Every output figure is (measured tokens from the ledger) x (these assumptions); the ledger itself stores none of it.

grid.source: placeholder global-average grid intensity. For time/region-specific carbon, replace this scalar with an `intensity_by_date` list — [{"from": "YYYY-MM-DD", "gco2e_per_kwh": N}, ...] — and `estimate` fixes each commit's intensity from its own timestamp.
